mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_webhook_config ( id, webhook_name, webhook_url, event_types, secret_key, status, retry_count, timeout_seconds, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{webhookName}, #{webhookUrl}, #{eventTypes}, #{secretKey}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{timeoutSeconds}, #{tenantId}, #{createdBy}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedTime}, #{deleted}, #{version} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_webhook_config SET webhook_name = #{webhookName}, webhook_url = #{webhookUrl}, event_types = #{eventTypes}, secret_key = #{secretKey}, status = #{status}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, timeout_seconds = #{timeoutSeconds}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, deleted = #{deleted}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, webhook_name, webhook_url, event_types, secret_key, status, retry_count, timeout_seconds, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version FROM sys_webhook_config WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, webhook_name, webhook_url, event_types, status, retry_count, timeout_seconds, created_time, updated_time FROM sys_webhook_config WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT id, webhook_name, webhook_url, event_types, secret_key, status, retry_count, timeout_seconds, tenant_id FROM sys_webhook_config WHERE deleted = FALSE AND status = 'ENABLED' AND event_types LIKE CONCAT('%', #{eventType}, '%')
